title: Attention Mechanism Path
description: Build fluency in Attention Mechanism inside Neural Networks by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Channel Attention
steps.summary: A technique used in computer vision to focus on specific channels or features of the input data. It sits inside Neural Networks / Attention Mechanism. Compare it with Channel-Wise Attention and Channel Attention Techniques. It opens into Channel-Wise Attention and Channel Attention Extensions.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Attention Weights
steps.summary: The weights learned by an attention mechanism to focus on specific parts of the input data. It sits inside Neural Networks / Attention Mechanism. Compare it with Windowed Attention and Tucker Attention.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Graph Attention Networks (GATs) Variants
steps.summary: Graph Attention Networks (GATs) Variants belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Attention Mechanism. It sits inside Neural Networks / Attention Mechanism. Start after Graph Attention Networks Variants and Graph Attention Networks (GATs). It opens into Graph Attention Networks (GATs) Variants Extensions and Graph Attention Networks (GATs) Variants Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Graph Attention Networks (GATs) Techniques
steps.summary: Graph Attention Networks (GATs) Techniques belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Attention Mechanism. It sits inside Neural Networks / Attention Mechanism. Start after Graph Attention Networks (GATs) and Graph Attention Network. It opens into Graph Attention Networks (GATs) Variants Techniques and Graph Attention Networks (GATs) Variants Extensions Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Self-attention Mechanism
steps.summary: Self-attention Mechanism belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Attention Mechanism. It sits inside Neural Networks / Attention Mechanism. Start after Attention Mechanism and Self-attention. It opens into Self-Attention Mechanism Variants and Self-Attention Mechanism Variants Extensions.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Hierarchical Attention Networks
steps.summary: Hierarchical Attention Networks belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Attention Mechanism. It sits inside Neural Networks / Attention Mechanism. Start after Hierarchical Networks and Hierarchical Network Models. It opens into Hierarchical Attention Mechanisms and Hierarchical Attention Networks (HAN).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Graph Attention Networks Variants
steps.summary: Graph Attention Networks Variants belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Attention Mechanism. It sits inside Neural Networks / Attention Mechanism. Start after Graph Attention Network and Graph. It opens into Graph Attention Networks (GATs) Variants and Graph Attention Networks (GATs) Variants Extensions.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Attention-Based Models Techniques
steps.summary: Attention-Based Models Techniques belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Attention Mechanism. It sits inside Neural Networks / Attention Mechanism. Start after Attention-based Networks and Attention-based Models. It opens into Attention-Based Recurrent Models Techniques and Attention-Based Generative Adversarial Networks (AttGAN) Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
